configurePresets.name: host-openmp
configurePresets.description: CPU build; portable everywhere, no GPU. Good for correctness/CI and for voronoi_dynamics. Run tools/bootstrap_deps.sh host-openmp first.

configurePresets.name: nvidia-cuda
configurePresets.description: Local dev box: RTX 5080 / CUDA 13.2. The primary development target. Run tools/bootstrap_deps.sh nvidia-cuda first.

configurePresets.name: lumi-hip
configurePresets.displayName: LUMI (Kokkos HIP backend, AMD MI250X gfx90a)
configurePresets.description: AMD ROCm target. Not yet exercised (no LUMI access); kept in lockstep so the NVIDIA work stays portable. Run tools/bootstrap_deps.sh lumi-hip first.
